The additional services include 'premium membership', 'family counseling', 'wellness programs', 'concierge services', and 'dedicated advisor', which map to 'Premium Insurance Membership' (rating 6), 'Family Therapy Coverage' (rating 2), 'Wellness Programs' (rating 3), and 'Concierge Services' (rating 2).
